mainEntity.name: Process for LA attorneys to audit current AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: Process for LA attorneys to audit current AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Query ChatGPT/Perplexity incognito. 2. Check directory consistency. 3. Analyze schema/errors. 4. Review E-E-A-T gaps. Use free tools like SEMrush AI.

suggestedAnswer.text: LA firms test 20 queries like 'LA employment lawyer.' Score citations (0-10). Fix top gaps first. Monthly audits prevent drops. Pro services $2k/audit with benchmarks. Competitors use this intel—stay ahead.
